# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Deployment location."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), '-asp')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the App Service plan."
      }
    },
    "webAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), '-webapp')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the web app."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), '-sqlsrv')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Server."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Server administrator username."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Server administrator password."
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[toLower(concat(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), 'stg'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Storage Account."
      }
    },
    "storageSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Storage account replication SKU."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net')]",
    "sqlConnectionString": "[concat('Server=tcp:', variables('sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName'), ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminUsername'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]",
    "storageConnectionString": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "B1",
        "tier": "Basic",
        "size": "B1",
        "capacity": 1
      },
      "properties": {
        "reserved": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('storageSkuName')]"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdminUsername')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "S0",
        "tier": "Standard"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('webAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "alwaysOn": true,
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "1"
            },
            {
              "name": "SQL_CONNECTION_STRING",
              "value": "[variables('sqlConnectionString')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING",
              "value": "[variables('storageConnectionString')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION",
              "value": "~18"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "webAppUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('https://', parameters('webAppName'), '.azurewebsites.net')]"
    },
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    }
  }
}
